channel.title: 1200km Security Research
channel.description: CTI-to-detection research, AdversaryGraph updates, malware analysis, detection engineering, security labs, and analyst tooling by Andrey Pautov.

item.title: AdversaryGraph v6.0.0 Stable Release
item.description: AdversaryGraph v6.0.0 is the latest stable release. Post-v6.0.0 work on main is Unreleased.

item.title: Newest Detection Engineering Techniques
item.description: 1200km ecosystem page for the Medium article Newest Detection Engineering Techniques: telemetry-first engineering, validation, stateful correlation, risk scoring, cloud, CI/CD, runtime, data lakes, and AI-agent detection.

item.title: Embedded Systems, Hardware, Firmware
item.description: Source-verified CTI research on embedded systems, edge appliances, BMC, UEFI, firmware, SOHO routers, OT/IoT devices, and hardware trust boundaries.

item.title: From Log to Report: Using AdversaryGraph to Turn Firewall and EDR Noise Into a CTI Investigation
item.description: A practical AdversaryGraph workflow from firewall and EDR telemetry to IOC extraction, enrichment, relationship graph review, ATT&CK leads, and an AI-assisted report.

item.title: Historical: AdversaryGraph v4 Capability Map
item.description: Historical, version-specific AdversaryGraph v4 capability map. The current stable release is v6.0.0; post-v6 work on main is Unreleased.
